# frontegg_tenant_oidc_config (Resource)

Configures an OIDC SSO configuration for a Frontegg tenant. Users whose email domain matches a domain associated with this configuration will be redirected to the OIDC Identity Provider (IdP) for authentication.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tenant_id` (String) The ID of the tenant that owns this SSO configuration.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the SSO configuration is enabled.
- `oidc_client_id` (String) The client ID of the OIDC application registered on the external IdP (e.g. Okta, Azure AD).
- `oidc_secret` (String, Sensitive) The client secret for the OIDC application. Used with `oidc_client_id` to authenticate token exchange requests with the IdP.
- `override_active_tenant` (Boolean) Whether to override the active tenant for users matched by this SSO configuration.
- `skip_email_domain_validation` (Boolean) When true, users can authenticate via this SSO configuration even if the associated email domain has not been validated through DNS TXT record verification.
- `sso_endpoint` (String) The IdP's login or authorization endpoint URL.
- `sub_account_access_limit` (Number) Limits which sub-accounts can access via this SSO configuration.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the SSO configuration was created.
- `generated_verification` (String) A computed token used to verify domain ownership. Add this value as a DNS TXT record on your domain to validate it.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String) When the SSO configuration was last updated.
